summary: Color-graded video with a music bed and no speech, posted by a Border Patrol chief. Footage shows two young men with their hands placed flat against the side of a white Border Patrol vehicle as they are searched in a daytime outdoor setting with desert brush behind. The tweet text states that the Border Patrol will respond to illegal crossings.

script.scene: Two young men with hands flat against the side of a white Border Patrol vehicle being searched, desert brush behind; music bed, no speech.
